A budget of 15,00,00, 000 / - (Rupees Fifteen Crores only) is being approved by the Administrator subject to fulfilment of the following condition: - (a) Sample map, layout map as well as detailed map should be started only with the approval of the Architect before starting the work.
(b) Work should be undertaken with a broad budget while dealing with the provision laid down in the budget.
(e) Technical approval should be obtained from the Executive Engineer concerned for the work.
(S) At the time of actual work, Department of Environment, Government Decision No. ENV-2013 / P.S. No.177 / T. C.% d. Action should be taken as per the guidelines mentioned in January 10, 2014.

(f) Public Works Department Government Decision No. BDG 2017 / P.S.No.60 / Ima-2, D. Action should be taken under 07.07.2017.
